Victor Tyrell was a knight from House Tyrell. He was a distant cousin of Lord Mace Tyrell of Highgarden. He had two children, Victaria and Ser Leo Tyrell.[1]

History[ ]

Victor was slain by the Smiling Knight of the Kingswood Brotherhood.[1]
